headline.line1: Solar cleaning robotics for every PV site —

Hero.subline: From remote-controlled cleaning to autonomous fleets, Cleanuva provides cost-efficient solar cleaning robots for rooftops, commercial PV and utility-scale plants — with an AI platform to help coordinate work, verify results and shorten the path to payback.
Hero.sceneAlt: A solar plant running on the Cleanuva operating layer, with a connected cleaning robot executing a task

Outcome.title: Verified recovery, where it pays.
Outcome.body: Where soiling economics justify it, Cleanuva confirms recovered yield against real generation — financial-grade evidence you can act on and stand behind, not an estimate.

Loop.title: Fragmented layers, one connected system.
Loop.body: Connect, analyze, inspect, execute, verify — the architecture in motion. Fragmented systems, workflows, and intelligence become one coordinated, accountable operation.

Proof.title: Outcomes, not dashboards.
Proof.note: Illustrative figures — verified case studies coming soon.

Solutions.title: Built for everyone who runs solar.

owners.title: Self-operated Asset Owners
owners.outcome: Run a lean in-house team without losing your operation's hard-won expertise.
owners.help: Keep senior-engineer know-how in the system, so a smaller team can run the whole portfolio with confidence.

om.title: Independent O&M Providers
om.outcome: Escape the multi-portal scramble — and win renewals with proof.
om.help: Run every client's mixed fleet from one place, and hand owners verified cleaning-ROI evidence that locks in the next contract.

ipps.title: Financial Asset Owners / IPPs
ipps.outcome: An independent, trustworthy read on what your contractors actually deliver.
ipps.help: Audit performance and verify real recovery yourself — no more taking the O&M report on faith.

epc.title: EPC Contractors
epc.outcome: Differentiate your tender, and protect yourself through the warranty period.
epc.help: Hard evidence to delineate performance liability — and an intelligent operating layer that strengthens your bid.

auditor.title: Technical Auditors
auditor.outcome: Turn years of messy historical data into fast, financial-grade reports.
auditor.help: Drop in historical exports and inspection reports and get clean degradation and recovery analysis in minutes.

page.title: For the people who run solar.
page.intro: Cleanuva Solutions packages Platform and Robotics into one accountable operation for every role in the asset's life — instead of a dozen disconnected tools. Here's what that looks like for each.
page.ctaBody: A short, focused demo on your assets — no account needed.

FinalCta.title: Get the right solar cleaning solution for your site.
FinalCta.body: Tell us about your PV site, roof type and cleaning needs — we'll help match the right combination of Cleanuva robotics, accessories and AI platform support.

CommandCenter.title: One live operational picture.
CommandCenter.body: A preview of the Cleanuva Command Center — portfolio health, live telemetry, work orders, AI recommendations, and verified outcomes, all in one room.
CommandCenter.mapAlt: Portfolio map showing site status across regions
CommandCenter.verified: Outcome verified — yield back on the meter

Vision.title: Where the loop goes next.
Vision.body: A look at the capabilities we're building toward. These are on our roadmap — not yet generally available.

drone.title: Drone Inspection
drone.desc: A connected aerial and thermal data-capture layer, feeding inspection straight into the Copilot's intelligence.

thermal.title: Thermal Inspection
thermal.desc: Thermal and IR findings from specialist inspection partners, connected into your operating picture.

defect.title: Defect Detection
defect.desc: Module-level defect classification from specialist providers, fed straight into the Copilot view.

twin.title: Digital Twin
twin.desc: A living model of every asset for what-if operations.

agents.title: Autonomous operation
agents.desc: Narrow, audited automation — earned only after the advisory Copilot has proven itself.

Hero.eyebrow: The AI-native operating layer for solar
Hero.headline: The operating system for solar assets.
Hero.subline: Cleanuva unifies your fragmented systems, coordinates the work, and gives your team an AI Copilot grounded in your plant's own operational knowledge — so you run the operation instead of chasing it.
Hero.sceneAlt: The Cleanuva Command Center showing live portfolio intelligence

Roi.title: Verified recovery — proven against real results.
Roi.subline: A financial-grade view of recovered yield, reconciled against real generation rather than estimated. Worked example · 250 MWp portfolio · 30-day window, where soiling economics justify it. Illustrative figures.

IntelArc.title: From signal to evidence-based decision.
IntelArc.body: Before anyone drives to site, Cleanuva turns raw signals into an evidence-based diagnosis — so every dispatch is a decision you can justify.

connect.title: Connect
connect.desc: Ingest signals and link every asset into one live picture.

analyze.title: Analyze
analyze.desc: AI diagnosis, alarm correlation, and root-cause analysis.

inspect.title: Inspect
inspect.desc: Confirm the fault in the field with targeted imagery.

Capabilities.title: Everything it takes to run the operation.
Capabilities.body: One operating system, organized as three layers — operational intelligence, coordination, and accountability.

telemetry.title: Telemetry Integration
telemetry.outcome: Every plant, inverter, and meter in one live picture — no more logging into a dozen portals.

diagnosis.title: AI Diagnosis
diagnosis.outcome: Interpret faults, correlate alarms, and confirm the root cause — your team acts on answers, not raw alarms.

analytics.title: Asset Performance Analytics
analytics.outcome: See exactly where yield and revenue are leaking across the whole portfolio.

correlation.title: Alarm Correlation
correlation.outcome: Thousands of alarms collapse into the few root causes that actually matter.

workOrders.title: Work Order Management
workOrders.outcome: Turn a diagnosis into the right job — assigned, tracked, and closed.

dispatch.title: Execution Dispatch
dispatch.outcome: Coordinate the right fix across crews, robots, and drones — automatically.

verification.title: Verification & Proof
verification.outcome: Measure the recovered yield and prove every euro back to owners and investors.

reporting.title: Reporting
reporting.outcome: Board-ready reports your asset managers and LPs actually trust.

Command.title: Mission control for your whole portfolio.
Command.body: One operating picture across every site — status, alarms, diagnosis, coordination, robots, and the AI Copilot. Not a dashboard you watch; a system you run.

rec.r1Desc: Recover +4.8% on DE-NRW-04 · String 12 — no truck roll.
rec.r2Desc: Alarm cluster resolves to a single root cause.

Deployment.title: Run it the way your business requires.
Deployment.body: Three deployment models, one platform. Choose by data ownership and operational needs — not by what we'd prefer to host.

saas.title: SaaS Cloud
points: Up and running in days, with no infrastructure to manage
Scales from one site to a global fleet automatically
Your data hosted in the EU, exportable any time
We run uptime, updates, and security for you
saas.bestFor: Best for: teams that want value fast

private.title: Private Cloud
points: Deployed in your own cloud tenancy or VPC
Scales with your infrastructure and controls
Full data residency and ownership in your environment
Meets stricter internal IT and compliance policies
private.bestFor: Best for: utilities and enterprises with strict IT policy

hybrid.title: Hybrid Cloud
points: Keep sensitive data on site, run analytics in the cloud
Place compute where it makes operational sense
You decide what stays inside your perimeter
Fits phased rollouts and mixed estates
hybrid.bestFor: Best for: mixed estates and phased rollouts

Security.title: Built for the people who answer to regulators and boards.
Security.body: The controls IPPs, asset owners, utilities, and enterprise O&M teams ask about — described plainly.

gdpr.title: GDPR readiness
gdpr.desc: Data handling aligned to GDPR, with clear processing terms and data-subject controls.

residency.title: EU data residency
residency.desc: Your operational data stays hosted in the EU by default.

rbac.title: Role-based access
rbac.desc: Each person gets exactly the access their role needs — nothing more.

audit.title: Auditability
audit.desc: Every action and change is logged and exportable for review.

verification.title: Verification trail
verification.desc: Each recovered-yield claim is backed by the data that proves it.

api.title: API integrations
api.desc: Connects to your existing SCADA, monitoring, and CMMS — it fits in, not over.

posture.title: Enterprise security posture
posture.desc: Encryption in transit and at rest, least-privilege access, and regular review.

Cta.title: See it run on your portfolio.
Cta.body: A focused demo on your sites, or a walkthrough of the live Command Center. No slideware.

WorksWithData.title: Built to connect with the data you already have.
WorksWithData.body: No new hardware, no rip-and-replace. Cleanuva is designed to work with the operational data your sites already produce — turning fragmented exports into one clear, actionable picture.
WorksWithData.foot: Built to connect with existing operational data — designed for historical CSV and inspection data.

EarlyAccess.title: Turn historical data into actionable insight.
EarlyAccess.body: Bring a historical export or an inspection report, and see Cleanuva turn it into a financial-grade analysis and clear next actions.

csv.title: Historical CSV Analysis
csv.desc: Drop in historical generation exports and surface soiling, underperformance, and recoverable yield.

pdf.title: Inspection Report Analysis
pdf.desc: Hand over an inspection report and get the defects, risks, and recommended actions.

EarlyAccess.note: An Early Access capability — we'll show it on your data.

existingData.q: Can Cleanuva work with my existing data?
existingData.a: Yes — it's built to connect with the operational data you already produce, including historical exports and inspection reports, with no new hardware.

hardware.a: No. Cleanuva is a software layer that works on top of the data you already have.

historical.a: Yes. Bring historical exports and past inspection reports, not just live data.

getStarted.a: Request a demo. We'll walk through your operation and the fastest path to results.

dataTypes.q: What types of operational data can be analyzed?
dataTypes.a: CSV exports from your monitoring platforms, plus inspection reports — historical or current. If your sites already produce it, Cleanuva is built to turn it into insight.

Hero.headline: Cleaning that runs itself.
Hero.subline: NuvaTrack robots clean autonomously, every night, with no crew on site — scheduled by AI and proven by the platform. Premium hardware, made intelligent.
Hero.sceneAlt: A NuvaTrack robot cleaning a solar array autonomously at golden hour

Autonomy.title: Built to operate without you.
Autonomy.body: NuvaTrack doesn't wait for a crew. It runs on its own schedule, makes its own cleaning decisions, and keeps the field at peak yield — every night, no one on site.

unmanned.title: Unmanned operation
unmanned.desc: Runs with no crew on site — deploy it and it works.

ai.title: AI-assisted decisions
ai.desc: It decides what to clean, and when it's worth it.

scheduling.title: Intelligent scheduling
scheduling.desc: Cleans on the right night, not a fixed calendar.

nightly.title: Every night
nightly.desc: Continuous, waterless cleaning while the plant sleeps.

Advantage.title: A cleaning robot that knows why it's there.
Advantage.body: Most cleaning robots are blind hardware. NuvaTrack is connected to the Cleanuva platform — so it cleans only where it pays, on the right schedule, and proves the yield it recovered.

knowsWhen.title: Knows when
knowsWhen.desc: AI scheduling cleans on the right night — not a fixed calendar.

cleansWhere.title: Cleans where it pays
cleansWhere.desc: Dispatched only to the rows losing real yield.

provesIt.title: Proves it worked
provesIt.desc: Recovered yield, measured and verified — not just a clean panel.

Fleet.title: Three models, one autonomous standard.
Fleet.body: Cleanuva Robotics is our first-party robot line — NuvaTrack R-Series, U-Series, and NuvaSpan, for single operators, fully autonomous nights, and utility-scale plants. Every one platform-connected and proven.

Partner.line: Premium hardware, engineered with manufacturing partners and Cleanuva-branded — made intelligent by the platform.

Cta.title: Bring autonomous cleaning to your plant.
Cta.body: Get pricing for your site — or see the platform that schedules, dispatches, and verifies every clean.

product.configBody: Tune each robot to your plant — batteries, brushes, service, and regional logistics. Pricing follows your configuration.

batteries.title: Battery options
batteries.desc: Runtime and swap options matched to shift length.

brushes.title: Brush systems
brushes.desc: Brush type tuned to your module and soiling.

logistics.title: Regional logistics
logistics.desc: Shipping, deployment, and support for your region.

product.advantageBody: Every NuvaTrack is dispatched, scheduled, and verified by the Cleanuva platform — so it cleans where it pays and proves the yield it recovered.
product.ctaBody: Get pricing for your site, or compare the models to find your fit.
product.specsNote: All figures from the product datasheet.
product.datasheetBody: Every dimension, spec, and option in one PDF.

compare.title: Find your NuvaTrack.
compare.body: Three models, one autonomous standard. Compare coverage, operation, and fit — then configure the one that matches your site.
compare.configNote: Every model configures the same way: batteries, brushes, warranty & service, and regional logistics.

rSeries.line: Efficient single-operator cleaning for rooftops, carports and distributed sites — dry or wet, with one person and one machine.
rSeries.alt: NuvaTrack R-Series single-operator solar-cleaning robot on a PV array
rSeries.positioning: Compact, high-efficiency tracked robots for distributed plants, carports and rooftop PV. One operator deploys, controls and finishes daily cleaning — dry brushing or wet rinse, in a single dual-ended pass.

a1.title: AI cleaning decisions
a1.desc: It decides which rows need cleaning, and when it pays.

a2.title: Single-operator fleet
a2.desc: One person supervises many robots across the site.

a3.title: Swap and resume
a3.desc: Swap a battery and it picks up where it left off.

d1.title: Rooftop & carport PV
d1.desc: Compact enough for rooftops, carports and tight rows.

d2.title: Distributed C&I portfolios
d2.desc: One operator moves it between nearby small-to-medium sites.

rSeries.bestFit: Rooftop, carport and small-to-medium distributed PV with an operator on hand.

features.f1: Single-operator remote with semi-auto lane assist
features.f2: Dual-mode cleaning — dry brushing or wet rinse
features.f3: Dual-ended pass: twin brushes with front and rear nozzles
features.f4: Modular build for one-person transport and setup

uSeries.line: Set it up once and it cleans on schedule — auto route planning, smart return-to-charge, no crew on site.
uSeries.alt: NuvaTrack U-Series unattended solar-cleaning robot at dusk
uSeries.positioning: Purpose-built for routine, high-frequency cleaning of large plants — it runs without on-site personnel, day or night, in harsh outdoor conditions. Dry, water-free, IP65.

a1.title: Fully unmanned
a1.desc: Runs with no crew on site, on its own schedule.

a2.title: Auto-charging
a2.desc: Returns to its dock and resumes without intervention.

a3.title: Nightly autonomy
a3.desc: Cleans while the plant sleeps, every night.

d1.title: Large unattended plants
d1.desc: Where no crew is on site — scheduled, hands-free cleaning.

d2.title: Harsh, dusty environments
d2.desc: IP65 and salt-resistant for desert, coastal and night work.

uSeries.bestFit: Large plants that need hands-free, high-frequency cleaning without on-site crew.

features.f1: True unattended operation — no on-site crew after setup
features.f2: Auto route planning and smart return-to-charge
features.f3: IP65, salt-resistant build for day or night
features.f4: Dry helical dual-fibre brushing — no water, no trace

nuvaSpan.line: Built for the longest rows and the hardest sites — rail-guided, water-free cleaning that cuts O&M workload and water use.
nuvaSpan.alt: NuvaSpan suspended solar-cleaning robot over a utility-scale plant
nuvaSpan.positioning: A suspended, bridge-type robot for utility-scale ground-mount and complex terrain. It travels automatically along project-specific rails to clear dust, sand and soiling — water-free, with onboard PV self-charging.

a1.title: Wide-span autonomy
a1.desc: Covers utility-scale rows in a single autonomous pass.

a2.title: Fleet sync
a2.desc: Coordinates multiple units across a large plant.

a3.title: Platform scheduling
a3.desc: The platform schedules cleaning across the whole site.

d1.title: Utility-scale ground-mount
d1.desc: Long rows and the largest plants, rail-guided.

d2.title: Complex terrain
d2.desc: Mountainous, desert/Gobi and long uneven rows.

nuvaSpan.bestFit: Utility-scale ground-mount and complex terrain (mountainous, desert, long uneven rows).

features.f2: Unattended after deployment, with self-check and diagnostics
features.f3: Battery with integrated PV self-charging — no external cabling
features.f4: Water-free dry brushing for dust, sand and bird droppings

accessories.title: Accessories and service parts for Cleanuva cleaning robots.
accessories.intro: Compatible accessories and service parts for Cleanuva cleaning robots — from brushes and motors to batteries, chargers, water hoses and maintenance kits. Select your robot model, tell us your site conditions, and our team will help match the right parts for your cleaning setup.
accessories.compatTitle: Matched to your robot and site.
accessories.compatLead: Accessories are matched by robot model, cleaning method and site conditions.

compat.point1: Tell us your robot model and site conditions.
compat.point2: We help match brushes, batteries, chargers and service kits.
compat.point3: Some parts depend on configuration and availability.

accessories.ctaBody: Tell us your robot model and site conditions — we’ll help identify the right parts and cleaning setup.

nuvar.note: Manual remote-controlled cleaning robot for flexible site work.

nuvar-pro.note: Remote-controlled upgrade option with camera-ready operation and heading-hold capability.

nuva-u.note: Unattended cleaning platform for repeatable PV site operations.

nuvaspan.note: Suspended cleaning solution for fixed installation scenarios.

brushes.title: Brushes
brushes.desc: Cleaning brushes matched to soiling and panel surface conditions.

batteries.title: Batteries
batteries.desc: Swappable battery packs to keep robots running through a shift.

chargers.title: Chargers
chargers.desc: Charging options for depot and on-site power.

remote-controllers.title: Remote controllers
remote-controllers.desc: Handheld controllers for the remote-controlled NuvaR and NuvaR Pro.

water-system.title: Water system parts
water-system.desc: Hoses, nozzles and pump parts for wet-mode cleaning.

service-kits.title: Service kits
service-kits.desc: Maintenance kits to keep a fleet serviceable in the field.

motors.title: Motors
motors.desc: Motor units for service, repair and replacement planning, matched by robot model and configuration.

water-hose.title: Water Hose
water-hose.desc: Water hose options for wet-cleaning setups, available in 50 m and 100 m lengths depending on site layout and cleaning method.

home.title: Solar-cleaning robots, ready to deploy.
home.intro: Three connected cleaning robots — single-operator, true unattended, and suspended for utility-scale terrain. Pick the model that fits your site and get a quote.

Fragmentation.title: Solar operations are fragmented.
Fragmentation.body: Different systems that don't talk, workflows scattered across tools and spreadsheets, expertise locked in a few heads, and no connected record of what worked. The owner is the integrator of last resort.
Fragmentation.leadOut: The enemy isn't dirt. It's fragmentation.

systems.title: Fragmented systems
systems.desc: Inverters, SCADA, meters, sensors, and point tools — none designed to interoperate.

workflows.title: Fragmented workflows
workflows.desc: Alarms, inspections, work orders, and reports live in disconnected tools. Nothing flows from detection to action to record.

intelligence.title: Fragmented intelligence
intelligence.desc: The expertise to interpret a fault is tacit, scarce, and walks out the door when people leave.

accountability.title: Fragmented accountability
accountability.desc: No connected record of what was decided, what was done, and whether it actually worked.

OperatingModel.title: Three layers that run a solar plant.
OperatingModel.body: Cleanuva Platform replaces fragmented tools with one operating layer — intelligence, coordination, and accountability, working as a single system.

intelligence.title: Operational Intelligence
intelligence.desc: Unify the data, interpret every alarm, and diagnose the root cause — the truth of the asset.

coordination.title: Operational Coordination
coordination.desc: Turn intelligence into orchestrated action — work orders, scheduling, and dispatch across any execution layer.

accountability.title: Operational Accountability
accountability.desc: Prove and report what happened — verification, reporting, and owner-facing summaries that close the loop.

Copilot.title: An AI Copilot that learns your operation.
Copilot.body: It learns from your operational history and verified outcomes — interpreting alarms, pinpointing the likely cause, and drafting the work order, in plain language. Advisory and source-cited, with a human in the loop. The result: faster diagnosis, better decisions, and higher recovery.
Copilot.note: Every answer is source-cited, and a human stays in the loop.

convo.user: Why is inverter 3 underperforming at DE-NRW-04?
convo.copilot: String 12 shows a 4.8% soiling loss, consistent with the dust trend since the last clean. Likely soiling, not a fault.
convo.source: Source: inverter 3 manual · soiling history · 2 inspection reports

Execution.title: Cleanuva Platform commands the execution.
Execution.body: Cleanuva Robotics — our own first-party robot line — leads the execution, alongside connected drones and field crews. Cleanuva Platform decides, they act, and every outcome is verified: a product line in its own right, not just an execution option.

robotics.title: Cleanuva Robotics
robotics.desc: Our first-party NuvaTrack robots — Cleanuva-branded, platform-directed, deployed where soiling economics justify it.

drones.title: Drone inspection
drones.desc: Connected aerial and thermal data-capture, feeding the Copilot's intelligence.

crews.title: Field crews
crews.desc: Your existing O&M teams, coordinated and dispatched from the same Command Center.

Footer.tagline: Find lost solar revenue. Recover it. Prove it.
Footer.brandLine: Cleanuva Platform · Cleanuva Robotics · Cleanuva Solutions

legal.brandOf: Cleanuva is a brand of NETRO Sparkle GmbH.

Company.title: Building the technology behind solar operations.
Company.lead: Cleanuva is a clean-energy technology brand for solar — one brand, three product lines: Cleanuva Platform (the AI software), Cleanuva Robotics, and Cleanuva Solutions. Together they turn fragmented tools, data, and execution into one accountable operation, not a dozen disconnected ones.

about.heading: Why Cleanuva exists
about.body1: Cleanuva is built from an operator's point of view. Anyone who has run hundreds of megawatts knows the problem: the systems that monitor a plant, inspect it, and clean it barely talk to each other, and the people in the field are left to stitch it together by hand.
about.body2: Cleanuva connects those layers — data integration, operational intelligence, an AI Copilot, workflow orchestration, execution, and accountability — into one operating layer for the whole portfolio.

focus.heading: Focused on solar
focus.body: We work in solar PV only. Not wind, not storage, not grid. That focus is deliberate — it keeps the product, the data model, and the field expertise sharp for the operators we serve.

entity.heading: The company behind Cleanuva
entity.body: Cleanuva is a brand of {entity}, an operating company based in Germany. Full registration details — registered office, commercial register, and management — are listed in our Imprint.

security.heading: Security & trust
security.body: Security and access control are built into the platform. You can review how we approach data isolation, access, and reliability on the Platform page.

contact.heading: Talk to us
contact.body: The fastest way to reach us is to request a demo — tell us about your portfolio and we'll follow up.
contact.legalNote: For legal and registration details, see the Imprint.

vision.heading: One brand, three product lines.
vision.body: Cleanuva is the brand. Cleanuva Platform is the AI software that runs the operation — with the AI Copilot at its core; Cleanuva Robotics is our connected first-party robot line; and Cleanuva Solutions packages them into delivery for every role that runs solar.

platform.title: Cleanuva Platform
platform.desc: The AI software that runs the operation — operational intelligence, coordination, and accountability for the whole portfolio, with the AI Copilot at its core. Valuable on its own, with or without robots.

solutions.title: Cleanuva Solutions
solutions.desc: Packaged delivery for every role that runs solar — Platform and Robotics combined and configured to your operation.

robotics.title: Cleanuva Robotics
robotics.desc: Our first-party robot line — NuvaTrack and NuvaSpan. Autonomous cleaning the Platform schedules, directs, and verifies.

Resources.title: Everything you need to evaluate Cleanuva.
Resources.intro: Product overviews and reference material. We're expanding this section — more brochures, models, and insights are on the way.
Resources.note: More resources — including downloadable brochures, the economic model, and operator insights — are coming soon.

platform.title: Platform overview
platform.desc: How Cleanuva Platform unifies intelligence, coordination, and accountability.

robotics.title: Robotics specifications

germany.label: German company

contact.desc: Reach us through Request a demo or Get pricing — no account required.

Trust.status: Cleanuva is at an early commercial stage. We welcome pilots, design partnerships, and deployment discussions with solar operators — and we don't claim customers we don't have.

HomeVideo.title: See the machines at work.
HomeVideo.body: From mobile cleaning to unattended operation, Cleanuva Robotics is built for real PV sites.
HomeVideo.alt: Cleanuva cleaning robot operating on a solar array

PlatformOverview.title: The AI platform behind the cleaning fleet.
PlatformOverview.body: Beyond the robots, Cleanuva runs an AI-native operations layer that coordinates cleaning, finds where production is slipping, and confirms the result.

ProofImpact.title: From cleaning action to verified impact.
ProofImpact.body: A short path from spotting lost output to proving the cleaning worked — so every visit is accountable.

detect.title: Detect loss
detect.desc: Spot soiling and underperformance across the plant.

clean.title: Clean with robots
clean.desc: Dispatch the right robot for the site and array.

verify.title: Verify the result
verify.desc: Confirm the array recovered after cleaning.

prove.title: Prove the impact
